query:
SELECT subject, body, sent_at, recipient_email 
FROM email_logs 
WHERE subject LIKE '%term%' OR subject LIKE '%agreement%' OR subject LIKE '%membership%' OR body LIKE '%amended%' OR body LIKE '%updated term%'
ORDER BY sent_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
